hero.alt: Automotive AI Dashboard showing customer engagement metrics, test drive scheduling analytics, and sales process optimization

boostSales.alt: Sales performance dashboard showing increased conversions and customer satisfaction metrics

testDriveScheduling.alt: AI-powered test drive scheduling system showing calendar integration and automated booking process

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Hello! Thank you for calling AutoDrive Motors. I’m your AI automotive assistant, here to help you schedule test drives, answer vehicle questions, and assist you anytime. How can I help you today?

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.text: Hi, I’m interested in booking a test drive.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: That’s great to hear. Which vehicle are you interested in — a sedan, SUV, or a specific model?

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.text: I’m interested in the new XDrive SUV.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Excellent choice. Are you looking for the petrol or diesel variant?

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Got it. When would you like to schedule your test drive? Today, tomorrow, or a specific date?

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Perfect. I see availability tomorrow at eleven a.m., two p.m., and five p.m. Which time works best for you?

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Great. I’ve scheduled your test drive for tomorrow at two p.m. Before I confirm, are you planning to purchase within the next three months, or are you just exploring options?

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.text: Probably within the next three months.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Thank you. You’ll receive a confirmation message, dealership address, and a pre-test drive checklist shortly. Would you also like pricing or financing options sent to you?

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.text: Yes, financing options would be helpful.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Absolutely. I’ll arrange that for you, and a sales advisor will reach out with complete details. Is there anything else I can assist you with today?

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: You’re very welcome. Thank you for choosing AutoDrive Motors. We look forward to seeing you tomorrow. Have a great day.
